name: Sprint 9 (unofficial)
version_note: v2 update on 2026-05-04: extended cutoff from May 2 to May 4 (planned end), added 12 May 3-4 PRs, added 10 retro tickets (BH-443 → BH-452) now in Done status.
note: No Jira sprint object created. Date-range release covering Apr 20 - May 4, 2026 (full planned 14-day window). Overlaps Sprint 8 (Apr 14-28) tail end + 6 days of post-Sprint 8 work.

tickets.note: 7 streaming/adapter tickets resolved Apr 25-May 2 (BH-431, 432, 437-441) + 10 retro tickets created May 2-4 and transitioned to Done (BH-443 → BH-452).

points.note: All 39 points are retro estimates on the 10 retro tickets. The 7 original streaming tickets remain unpointed.

goals: BrightSignals proactive notifications - end-to-end Slack delivery
Bedrock Converse migration for brightbot agent
Task scheduler MVP cross-repo + UI fixes/result display
BrightStudio Skills - first-class composable agent capabilities
UAT eval framework + Vega-Lite visualization rendering

carry_over.note: Sprint 8 still active in Jira - carryover analysis deferred to Sprint 8 close.

brightsignals.name: BrightSignals - Proactive Notifications
brightsignals.description: End-to-end proactive Slack notifications: subscriptions, poller, delivery, S3 attachments (Tier A + B envelope parser), notification dispatcher Lambda.

uat_evals_visualization.name: UAT Eval Framework + Vega-Lite Visualization
uat_evals_visualization.description: NEW (May 4): direct-call deterministic turn evals + HTTP scenario runner in slack-server. Vega-Lite render to PNG + artifact envelope emission in brightbot. Closes the loop between agent and Slack image rendering.

bedrock_migration.name: Bedrock Converse Migration
bedrock_migration.description: ChatBedrock to ChatBedrockConverse migration + deepagents upgrade. Foundation for production Bedrock agent runtime.

task_scheduler.name: Task Scheduler MVP + UI Fixes + Result Display
task_scheduler.description: Cross-repo agnostic scheduler MVP (core + webapp + brightbot), follow-up UI bug fixes and scheduled run result display surface, catalog/analytics schedule UI.

brightstudio_skills.name: BrightStudio Skills
brightstudio_skills.description: Skills as first-class agent capabilities in BrightStudio. Composable into custom personas. Major BrightStudio epic addition (BH-260).

streaming_platform.name: Streaming Platform Hardening
streaming_platform.description: Span streaming FSM guards, property tests via Hypothesis, clock injection (kill 21s of time.sleep), prototype removal, Cognito + Neo4j adapters.

duplicate_check.name: Upload Duplicate Detection
duplicate_check.description: Server-side duplicate check on data assets + files (Harbour) and case-insensitive filename matching (Ahmed).

synapse_hardening.name: Synapse + Ingestion Hardening
synapse_hardening.description: Synapse logic + cross-account role assumption + docs.

webapp_quality.name: Webapp Quality Fixes
webapp_quality.description: AG Grid serverside datasource fix (Marwan), login PW redundant check removal (Harbour).

retro_tickets.note: Created May 2-4, 2026 by Kuri to make Marwan/Harbour/Ahmed's untracked Q2 work visible in Jira. All transitioned to Done.
